extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR defended yellow on Col de Portet, responded to CARAPAZ attack with 200m to go, extended GC lead to 5:39 over URÁN
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ attacked final 200m but POGAČAR still had reserves to counter, revealing GC contenders completely spent earlier.
VINGEGAARD suffered on CARAPAS move but recovered to finish second, showing better resilience than other podium threats.
WOUT VAN AERT targeting KOM points on double-category climbs, calculating 50-point haul could flip polka dot classification.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Ninth yellow jersey day, responded to late CARAPAZ attack with reserves still available after Col de Portet
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Only rider capable of forcing POGAČAR to respond in final 200m, moved to third overall
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Suffered on CARAPAZ attack but recovered for second, maintains podium distance at 5:39
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Targeting early breakaways on mountain stages to contest KOM, only 11 points behind POELS with two climbs remaining
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: Dropped to fourth overall, losing podium to CARAPAZ, gap widening to 5:39 behind
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: First Tour abandon in career despite 2019 third place, JUMBO-VISMA losing GC depth
